title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash model offers multimodal capabilities including vision, video understanding, code generation, and workspace automation. The model demonstrates performance comparable to the Pro tier at lower cost, supporting workflows such as contract analysis, JSON parsing, and agentic task chains across Google's suite.
